zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Ogle於大約1414年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德吉可利時，她的父親Robert Ogle36歲，母親Margaret Grey34歲。她於1412年1月13日與Sir William De Heron在英國諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她於1439年住在英國諾圖波藍德貝爾賽。她去世於1435年9月1日之後在英國諾圖波藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Ogle于大约1414年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德吉可利时，她的父亲Robert Ogle36岁，母亲Margaret Grey34岁。她于1412年1月13日与Sir William De Heron在英国諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她于1439年住在英国諾圖波藍德貝爾賽。她去世于1435年9月1日之后在英国諾圖波藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Ogle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): from Ogle in Whalton, Northumberland. The placename might derive from the Old English personal name Ocga + Old English hyll ‘hill’. This surname has been established in Ireland since the mid 17th century.

variants.name: Ogles
meanings: English (southeastern): variant of Ogle , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Ogle was born about 1414, in Kirkley, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Ogle, was 36 and her mother, Margaret Grey, was 34. She married Sir William De Heron on 13 January 1412, in Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She lived in Belsay, Northumberland, England in 1439. She died after 1 September 1435, in Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Ogle est née environ 1414, à Kirkley, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Ogle, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margaret Grey, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William De Heron le 13 janvier 1412, à Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle a vécu à Belsay, Northumberland, Angleterre en 1439. Elle est décédée après 1 septembre 1435, à Northumberland, Angleterre.

Januar 1412 in Northumberland, England Sir William De Heron geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. 1439 hat sie in Belsay, Northumberland, England gelebt. Sie starb nach 1. September 1435 in Northumberland, England.

Lei sposato Sir William De Heron il 13 gennaio 1412, nel Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Vissuto a Belsay, Northumberland, England nel 1439. Morì dopo il 1 settembre 1435, nel Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Ogleが約1414年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドキルクリーで生まれた時，父Robert Ogleは36歳，母Margaret Greyは34歳であった。1412年1月13日にイギリスノースウンバーランドでSir William De Heronと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1439年にはイギリスノースウンバーランドベルサイに住んでいた。彼女は1435年9月1日以後にイギリスノースウンバーランドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Ogle(이)가 대략 1414년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 커클리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Ogle(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Grey(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1412년 1월 13일 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 Sir William De Heron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1439년도에 영국 노르스벌랜드 벨지에서 살았다. 그녀는 1435년 9월 1일 이후 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Ogle nasceu aproximadamente 1414, em Kirkley, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Ogle, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Grey, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William De Heron em 13 de janeiro de 1412, em Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela viveu em Belsay, Northumberland, Inglaterra em 1439. Ela faleceu após 1 de setembro de 1435, em Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Ogle родилась около 1414 г. в местности киркли, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Ogle было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Grey, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William De Heron 13 января 1412 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она жила в местности белсеи, нортумбирланд, Англия в 1439 году. Она умерла после 1 сентябрь 1435 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия.
